calendar.matters:
Notice Of Hearing On Petition To Confirm Contractual Arbitration Award
Off Calendar Nov-18-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES - ATTY. MARY KUFFNER, TEL. NO. (202)487-4784 APPEARING FOR THE PETITIONER BY TELEPHONE APPEARANCE;
NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THE MATTER.

RULING - The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PETITIONER THE UNIVERSAL AIR TRAVEL PLAN, INC.'S Petition To Confirm Contractual Arbitration Award is granted. No opposition to the motion was filed, nor was there a request to vacate or correct the award. ORDER AND JUDGMENT SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter: Sheryl L. Sawyer, CSR # 5976 =302/mjm
